title: Grilled Norwegian Couscous Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy low-carb-friendly dish featuring grilled couscous alongside kid-friendly vegetables.

ingredients.name: 3 medium-sized bell peppers, cut into strips

instructions: Cook couscous according to package instructions. Once cooked, let it cool and then gently fluff with a fork to prevent breaking apart.
Season the cooled couscous with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
While couscous is cooking, cut vegetables into small pieces.
Drizzle olive oil on bell peppers, red onion, and broccoli. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
Place vegetables in a single layer on the grill and cook for about 5-7 minutes per side until they are tender and slightly charred.
Mix cooled couscous with minced garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil to enhance flavors and bind it together if needed.
Stir-fry mixture of grilled vegetables along with the cooked couscous on medium heat in a pan for about 3-4 minutes until heated through.
Serve warm as an appetizer or snack.
